The flow

Agency Description Link
OPEC+ Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries and allies OPEC+
IEA International Energy Agency IEA
EIA Energy Information Agency (US) EIA
WOC World Petroleum Congress WOC
GAO Government Accountability Office GAO
DOJ Department of Justice DOJ
US Treasury US Department of the Treasury US Treasury
World Bank World Bank Group World Bank
BRICS BRICS nations (Brazil, Russia, India, China, South Africa) BRICS
NATO North Atlantic Treaty Organization NATO
FINRA Mark Data Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (FINRA) Market Data FINRA Mark Data
CIS Center for International Studies CIS
Moody’s Moody’s Investors Service Moody’s
Exxon ExxonMobil Exxon
LegiScan LegiScan - American legislative information LegiScan
BlackRock BlackRock, Inc. BlackRock
Berkshire Hathaway Berkshire Hathaway Inc. Berkshire Hathaway
SEC News US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) News SEC News
Arkham Blog Possibly a financial blog (more information needed to confirm) Enter “Arkham Blog” search query into your web browser
World Fed News Aggregator No specific source identified. Consider searching for “World Fed News Aggregator” IMF
